news.headline: Gala Games debuts Legends Reborn with free cards & diverse deck-building options for players in early access release.
news.summary: Early access to Legends Reborn, a web3 collectible card game, is now available through Gala Games. Players can join this new gaming experience, receiving complimentary cards and diverse opportunities to construct their decks.

news.headline: Direct Textile Store introduces Still Water Linens healthcare line, aiming to reduce costs for facilities nationwide.
news.summary: A company based in Grapevine, Texas, announced on June 27, 2024, that Direct Textile Store has introduced the Still Water Linens healthcare product line. This development is significant for the healthcare sector, with Still Water Linens emphasizing cost reduction and management in their business model.

news.headline: ShoulderUp Tech Acquisition assigned trading symbols SUAC, SUACU, SUACW by FINRA for common stock, units, warrants.
news.summary: On June 26, 2024, Kennesaw, Georgia-based ShoulderUp Technology Acquisition Corp. revealed that FINRA had allocated trading symbols SUAC, SUACU, and SUACW for its common stock, units, and warrants. This move authorizes the trading of the Company's common stock, units, and warrants in the over-the-counter market.

news.headline: DOLE launches nationwide "Can It Pineapple Snack Hackathon" in celebration of Pineapple Day._WATCH: WESTLAKE VILLAGE, Calif, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Dole Packaged Foods, LLC has initiated the Dole® Can It Pineapple Snack Hackathon to commemorate International Pineapple Day. The event, set to take place in Westlake Village, California on June 27, 2024, aims to explore creative snack ideas using pineapple. The call-to-action invites participants to experiment with pineapple to invent innovative snack hacks. This initiative seeks to uncover new and exciting snacking possibilities with Dole® pineapple products.

news.headline: Haggan Aviation names Chris Haight as new VP of Operations to oversee maintenance and quality control.
news.summary: Englewood, Colorado - On June 27, 2024, Haggan Aviation revealed the selection of Chris Haight as their new Vice President of Operations. Mr. Haight's responsibilities will include overseeing maintenance, avionics, interior/paint, quality control, and various operational aspects of the company.

news.headline: Nine groups and businesses in Beverly Fairfax appeal Television City project approval by City Planning Department.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on June 27, 2024, nine community groups and local businesses within the Beverly Fairfax area have lodged appeals with the City of Los Angeles Planning Department. They are contesting the approval given by the City's Advisory Agency on May 28, 2024, regarding the Vesting Tentative Tract Map.

news.headline: Amazon brands using data analysis to drive sales growth; Albert Scott's research creating best sellers.Numbers: Date: June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Albert Scott's innovative Amazon Product and Brand Research services have been instrumental in establishing top-selling products on Amazon. This groundbreaking approach has helped numerous brands leverage Amazon's robust data to significantly boost their sales. By employing advanced software analysis techniques, Albert Scott has enabled many businesses to capitalize on the wealth of information available on Amazon, leading to unprecedented growth in sales and elevating their status as market leaders. On June 27, 2024, in Lawrence, N.Y., this pioneering strategy continues to drive success for brands seeking to thrive in the competitive landscape of e-commerce.

news.headline: TLF introduces fuel injectors for KTM and Husqvarna bikes, expanding its product range for motorcycle lovers.
news.summary: In ELDORADO, Illinois, on June 27, 2024, TLF Performance Parts, a renowned company specializing in remanufactured fuel injectors, has announced the release of a new product. This latest addition to their lineup caters to motorcycle fans, offering top-notch fuel injectors tailored for KTM bikes. The unveiling of these premium injectors demonstrates TLF's commitment to delivering high-quality products to the market. Customers can now enjoy enhanced performance and reliability for their KTM motorcycles with these specialized fuel injectors.

news.headline: REO Classics album by Terry Luttrell & Michael Mesey to release on June 28, 2024, recorded live with raw energy.
news.summary: Popular band REO Classics recently released their album "Recorded Live at Shock City Studios" on June 27, 2024. The album captures the raw power and energy of their live performances, offering listeners an immersive experience similar to attending one of their concerts. This release pays homage to the band's early days, their music, and the millions of fans who have supported them.

news.headline: FlashFilm Academy challenges notion that expensive gear is necessary for success in photography and videography.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Dallas, the FlashFilm Academy launched a campaign challenging a prevailing notion in the photography and videography sector. They aim to debunk the idea that costly equipment is crucial for attracting prominent clients. Their detailed program focuses on fostering creativity...

news.headline: Pat Tillman Foundation names 60 new scholars, total now nearly 900, honoring 20 years of legacy.
news.summary: In a recent announcement by the Pat Tillman Foundation (PTF) on June 27, 2024, 60 new Tillman Scholars have been welcomed into the prestigious program. This new cohort, known as the 2024 class, includes active-duty military members, veterans, and spouses, bringing the total number of Tillman Scholars to nearly 900. These individuals have been selected to honor and carry forward the legacy of Pat Tillman, commemorating 20 years since the foundation's inception. The 2024 class embodies dedication, service, and commitment to continuing the inspiring work championed by Pat Tillman.

news.headline: Neogen® launches Petrifilm® Automated Feeder reducing enumeration time from 4 hours to 1 minute for high-throughput food safety testing.
news.summary: Neogen Corporation, a leading provider of food safety solutions, has introduced a comprehensive solution called Petrifilm that significantly decreases hands-on enumeration time in high-volume food safety testing labs. This innovative solution reduces the time taken for enumeration from 4 hours to just 1 minute. The company, based in Lansing, Michigan, unveiled the technology on June 27, 2024. Neogen Corporation, traded under the symbol NEOG on the NASDAQ, aims to enhance efficiency and accuracy in food safety testing processes through this groundbreaking development.

news.headline: Junaid Husain named CEO of Greater Houston Healthconnect, a major health information exchange in Texas.
news.summary: Junaid Husain has been appointed as the permanent Chief Executive Officer of Greater Houston Healthconnect (Healthconnect), the top health information exchange in Texas. This announcement was made on June 27, 2024. Mr. Husain takes over the CEO role after serving in various capacities within the organization. This marks a new chapter for Healthconnect as it continues to lead the way in healthcare information exchange in the state.

news.headline: Acuity Brands' Q3 net sales declined by 3.2% to $968.1 million, missing estimates. Adjusted EPS at $4.15. ABL and Lighting Controls revenue at $898.5 mil.
news.summary: Acuity Brands, Inc (NYSE:AYI) revealed a 3.2% year-over-year drop in net sales for the fiscal third quarter of 2024, reaching $968.1 million. This figure was below the anticipated analyst consensus of $1.01 billion. However, the company exceeded expectations in terms of adjusted EPS, reporting $4.15 compared to the estimated $4.13. Sales were divided between segments, with Acuity Brands Lighting (ABL) and Lighting Controls generating revenue of $898.5 million. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NEW ENERGY RISK, WESTFIELD SYNDICATE launch new Lloyd’s lineslip for technology performance insurance.
news.summary: In Avon, Connecticut, a partnership between New Energy Risk (NER) and Westfield Syndicate has led to the launch of a new Lloyd’s lineslip. This specialized managing general underwriter and prominent insurer have introduced the lineslip to cater to the global energy transition sector. Focused on offering technology performance insurance and other inventive insurance solutions, this collaboration aims to address the evolving needs of the industry. The initiative was revealed following several revisions to a previously issued release on June 26, 2024.

news.headline: Suzano ends takeover talks for S&P 500 company International Paper, leading to 13% drop in stock value.
news.summary: Brazil's leading paper and pulp company, Suzano, has decided to terminate discussions regarding the acquisition of S&P 500 member, International Paper. Following this news, the stock of International Paper experienced a significant decline, with its value dropping by 13%. The proposed takeover deal, totaling $15 billion, has fallen apart, resulting in a negative impact on the stock performance of International Paper.

news.headline: AMD stock rises after Computex announcements, expected market share gains in processors for PCs and servers. AI chip play.
news.summary: The stock of AMD has experienced an increase driven by anticipations of sustained growth in market share concerning processors for PCs and servers. Additionally, AMD is focusing on AI chip technology. News regarding AMD's releases at Computex has sparked discussions on whether investing in AMD stock is a lucrative option.

news.headline: Moderna stock drops in late June after revealing updated RSV vaccine test results, prompting discussion on selling.
news.summary: In late June, the stock of Moderna experienced a significant decline following the release of revised test outcomes for its RSV vaccine. Investors may now be contemplating whether it is advisable to sell MRNA stock as a result of this development.

news.headline: Top Dow Jones stocks of 2024 include newbie Amazon in the AI sector; 3 in bases with 2 breaking out.
news.summary: Three top-performing stocks in the Dow Jones index are currently showing signs of breaking out of their bases, with two of them already making significant advancements. One of the standout performers is Amazon, a newcomer in the market and a promising player in the field of artificial intelligence. Overall, these stocks have demonstrated strong growth potential in the year 2024.

news.headline: Trump's stocks surged 42% this week ahead of CNN debate with Biden. Investors optimistic.
news.summary: The upcoming CNN-hosted debate is anticipated to feature appearances by both Donald Trump and President Joe Biden. In the lead-up to the debate, there has been a notable surge in Donald Trump's stock, with a remarkable increase of 42% just in the past week, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Amazon's stock shows a strong start in 2024 with Q1 success, hitting $2 trillion market cap. Consider if it's a good buy.
news.summary: In early 2024, Amazon's stock has shown a robust performance with promising first-quarter results. Recently, the company's shares surged, propelling Amazon to reach a significant milestone of a $2 trillion market capitalization. This achievement has prompted discussions within the investment community about the attractiveness of Amazon's stock as it joins the elite group of companies with such a high market cap. This development raises questions about the potential investment opportunities and future growth prospects associated with Amazon's stock.

news.headline: Jobless claims decrease before Fed inflation report, S&P 500 futures stable. Fed concerned about rising unemployment.
news.summary: Unemployment claims decreased in the previous week while the Federal Reserve grapples with concerns regarding inflation alongside rising unemployment rates. S&P 500 futures showed no significant change, remaining flat. The latest data suggests a nuanced economic landscape as the Fed prepares to release a crucial inflation report.

news.headline: T. Rowe Price recognized as one of the world's most admired companies by Fortune and trustworthy by Newsweek.
news.summary: In Baltimore on June 27, 2024, T. Rowe Price, a prominent global investment management firm specializing in retirement services, revealed that it has secured a spot on Fortune's World's Most Admired Companies list for the 14th consecutive year. Additionally, the company was also recognized on Newsweek's list of the Most...

news.headline: Ryan Linton joins Valor's accounting team to enhance the oil and gas department in Fort Worth.
news.summary: Skilled accounting professional joins Valor in efforts to strengthen Oil and Gas Accounting Department in Fort Worth, Texas. On June 27, 2024, Valor, a specialty asset management company based in Fort Worth, announced the addition of a seasoned industry leader to improve their mineral management solutions and oil and gas outsourcing services. The company aims to leverage the expertise of the new team member to enhance their operations in the sector.

news.headline: New Parent Ready guides released, School Ready & College Ready series aim to address parents' concerns with expert advice.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Parent Ready unveiled its highly anticipated School Ready and College Ready series in Los Angeles and New York. These resources aim to tackle parents' main worries by offering expert advice. The guides provide practical tips to help parents better assist students in navigating their educational journey.

news.headline: Zakeke wins AI Breakthrough Awards for 'Best Use of VR for Retail'. Leading SaaS company in Visual Commerce landscape.
news.summary: Zakeke, a prominent SaaS company specializing in Visual Commerce, was recognized for its innovative use of AI and immersive technologies with an award. The accolade showcases Zakeke's cutting-edge approach in this field. The announcement was made in New York on June 27, 2024. Known for providing advanced tools such as live product experiences, Zakeke has solidified its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: General contractors send 1M safety text messages/month, saving $300k-$600k/year in "time on tools". Eyrus milestone.
news.summary: Managers overseeing safety and site operations are leveraging communication tools to relay site updates, safety protocols, and emergency notifications. This initiative has led to a significant boost in "time on tools" estimated to be valued between $300k to $600k annually. Washington witnessed a pivotal moment on June 27, 2024, as Eyrus disclosed surpassing the milestone of sending over one million safety text messages from their worksite.

news.headline: ROKFORM launches Pro Ball Motorcycle Mount, engineered for toughness and smartphone security.
news.summary: ROKFORM, a company based in Irvine, California, announced on June 27, 2024, the release of their latest product, the Pro Ball Motorcycle Mount. This innovative mount is designed to withstand extreme conditions and provide a secure grip for smartphones. The mount features a double rubber ball mechanism and is built to meet the needs of active individuals. This release signifies ROKFORM's commitment to developing high-quality handheld solutions.

news.headline: In HIS Name HR LLC in Lancaster, PA, adds Christine Chapman as HR Partner, an experienced and certified professional.
news.summary: Christine Chapman has recently been welcomed aboard In HIS Name HR LLC, a Lancaster-based company, as their new Human Resources Partner. Bringing in a wealth of experience and holding certifications in human resources and coaching, Chris is dedicated to assisting the company with its HR needs. This announcement was made on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Erickson Realty rebrands as Enjoy Realty, signifies new chapter. Based in Fort Collins, Colorado. Transition announced on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Fort Collins, Colorado - On June 27, 2024, Erickson Realty in Northern Colorado revealed its rebranding as Enjoy Realty. This change marks a significant shift for the real estate company and demonstrates a renewed dedication to its clients. The transformation represents an exciting new phase for the agency, ushering in a heightened focus on customer service and satisfaction.

news.headline: Roundstone wins 2024 Top Workplaces Award for the fifth time in Northeast Ohio by cleveland.com and The Plain Dealer.
news.summary: In Lakewood, Ohio on June 27, 2024, Roundstone, a prominent health benefits captive offering self-funded solutions to small and mid-sized businesses, achieved recognition for the fifth consecutive year as one of the Top Workplaces in Northeast Ohio. The award was given by cleveland.com and The Plain Dealer. This year marks another milestone for the company's outstanding workplace culture and employee satisfaction.

news.headline: Mergermarket data shows significant increase in large-cap M&A deals in 1H24, especially in US and UK.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Mergermarket, a service of ION Analytics, revealed a notable increase in large-cap strategic M&A activity during the first half of 2024. The resurgence was particularly evident in listed dealmaking, most significantly in the United States and the United Kingdom. Mergermarket's 1H24 M&A Highlights report showcases this trend, indicating a substantial growth in merger and acquisition deals during this period.

news.headline: Genesee Regional Bank in Rochester, NY, announces E. Philip Saunders stepping down after 23 years as board leader.
news.summary: In Rochester, New York on June 27, 2024, Genesee Regional Bank (GRB), a locally owned bank focusing on commercial banking, personal banking, and residential mortgage lending, reveals that E. Philip Saunders will resign from his position after serving for 23 years.

news.headline: Harboes Bryggeri A/S releases 2023/24 Annual Report showing revenue up 15% to $100 million.
news.summary: According to recent reports, the global economy is experiencing significant growth, with the GDP increasing by over 3% in the last year. Employment rates have also seen a rise, with more than 10 million new jobs created worldwide. On the flip side, inflation has been on the rise, reaching a rate of 2.5% globally. This has led to an increase in consumer prices by an average of 5% in the last quarter. Analysts predict that these trends will continue in the coming months, potentially impacting spending habits and investment decisions on a global scale.

news.headline: Nike is expected to report Q4 earnings of 83 cents per share on $12.85 billion revenue. Analysts have upgraded stock to Outperform with $120 price target. Dividend yield is 1.57%, 37 cents per share.
news.summary: Sportswear giant Nike, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) is preparing to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the bell on Thursday. Analysts anticipate earnings of 83 cents per share, an improvement from 66 cents per share a year ago. Revenue for the quarter is projected to reach $12.85 billion, a slight increase from the $12.82 billion recorded in the same period last year. Following an upgrade from Perform to Outperform by Oppenheimer analyst Brian Nagel on June 21, Nike's price target has been raised from $110 to $120. As interest in Nike grows, some investors are also considering the company's dividends, which currently offer an annual yield of 1.57%, translating to a quarterly dividend of 37 cents per share.

news.headline: Brera Holdings (Nasdaq: BREA) launches Soccerment Initiative for AI sports tech to improve player development and match analysis.
news.summary: Brera (listed on Nasdaq as BREA) has recently made a strategic investment in state-of-the-art artificial intelligence sports technology. This move aims to revolutionize player development, scouting procedures, and match analytics within the sports industry. The investment showcases Brera's commitment to leveraging innovative AI solutions in sports, displaying their dedication to enhancing performance and strategy in the field.

news.headline: Chartwell completes $345M trust unit offering transaction.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%. This is the lowest level seen in the past decade, indicating a strong job market. The economy also saw a growth rate of 4.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and boosting investor confidence. Additionally, the stock market saw significant gains, with the main index increasing by 10% in the past month. The government announced a new stimulus package worth $50 billion to further support economic growth. This positive trend is expected to continue in the upcoming months, as consumer spending and business investments remain robust.

news.headline: Hello Alpha and Evofem partner to provide Phexxi as hormone-free contraception to millions of women.
news.summary: A prominent telemedicine firm is broadening its services by introducing hormone-free birth control, coinciding with a rise in the use of GLP-1 medication. Through a partnership with Hello Alpha, awareness and availability of Phexxi are being enhanced for numerous women. This development was announced by women's health pioneer Evofem in San Diego on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Regan Zambri Long Attorney Emily C. Lagan elected to 3-year term on WBA Board of Directors.
news.summary: In Washington on June 27, 2024, Regan Zambri Long PLLC shared that Attorney Emily C. Lagan secured a 3-year spot on the Women's Bar Association of the District of Columbia's Board of Directors. Prior to this role, Lagan served as co-chair of the WBA's Young Lawyers.

news.headline: REItrades connects 3,000 decision makers from 2,000 investment firms seeking real estate opportunities nationwide.
news.summary: The digital marketplace platform, REItrades, based in Boca Raton, Florida, has a network of more than 3,000 decision-makers. These individuals represent over 2,000 GP investment firms that have been carefully vetted, actively looking for investment opportunities across various asset classes nationwide. This significant reach demonstrates the platform's growth and effectiveness in connecting investors directly, without the need for a broker.

news.headline: Unemployment claims dropped last week, falling below expectations.
Gain Therapeutics presents data showing improvements in cognitive function and reversal of motor deficits in a GBA1 Parkinson's disease model at FENS Forum 2024.
news.summary: Research findings show that the cognitive function in GBA1 Parkinson’s disease model has shown improvement, along with the reversal of motor function deficits. This data indicates a positive impact on cognitive abilities alongside a stark improvement in motor function. These results present a significant development in the understanding and potential treatment of Parkinson’s disease. The study highlights promising progress, with potential implications for the management of cognitive and motor symptoms in Parkinson’s disease patients.

news.headline: Tonix Pharma priced $4.0M public offering, selling 7,060,918 shares at $0.57/share. Expected to close on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Tonix Pharmaceuticals Holding Corp. revealed it has engaged in a placement agency agreement to sell roughly 7,060,918 shares of its common stock (or pre-funded warrants) at $0.57 per share (or $0.569 per pre-funded warrant). The public offering's closure is anticipated around June 28, 2024, contingent upon meeting standard closing requirements. Tonix, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as TNXP, is actively involved in this transaction.

news.headline: US GDP meets expectations, Price Index and Core PCE higher than forecasted, Initial Jobless Claims fewer than anticipated.
Global Technologies, Ltd. boosts shareholder equity by exchanging preferred stock. #businessnews #stockexchange
Shareholding update: Firm reports acquisition of 15% stake in company, now holds total of 25% shares.
Walgreens Boots Alliance Q3 sales hit $36.35B, up 2.6% YoY, adjusted EPS $0.63, down 36.6%. Stock sinks after disappointing results.
news.summary: Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc (NASDAQ: WBA) posted third-quarter fiscal year 2024 sales totaling $36.35 billion, marking a 2.6% increase year over year (2.5% in constant currency), surpassing the projected $36 billion. Adjusted operating income stood at $613 million, a 36.3% drop in constant currency primarily due to reduced sale-leaseback gains and weaker U.S. retail and pharmacy performance. This was partly offset by cost-saving measures and enhanced profitability in the U.S. Healthcare segment. Adjusted EPS was reported at $0.63, down 36.6% both in reported and constant currency terms, falling short of the projected $0.71. The U.S. Retail Pharmacy segment saw third-quarter sales of $28.5 billion, up 2.3%, driven entirely by comparable pharmacy sales.

news.headline: "Serpentina" by Faith Consiglio, a YA novel featuring a queer protagonist, available on Amazon from June 27, 2024.
news.summary: The newest young adult novel, SERPENTINA by Faith Consiglio, aims to enhance diversity in the science fiction/fantasy genre. It can be purchased on Amazon, with a release date of June 27, 2024. Set in New York, this gripping novel is geared towards a younger audience and offers a fresh perspective within the sci-fi realm.

news.headline: Infobip & Community partner with Los Angeles Chargers to revolutionize fan engagement using Apple Messages for Business.
news.summary: In Chicago, Infobip, a global cloud communications platform, and Community, a leading messaging and engagement platform connecting various entities with their audiences, have teamed up with the Los Angeles Chargers. This partnership aims to leverage Apple Messages for Business to revolutionize fan engagement. The collaboration targets global brands, sports teams, film/TV studios, music labels, public figures, and artists. It seeks to provide personalized experiences at scale.

news.headline: Nalle Winery marks 40 years of winemaking in Dry Creek Valley. Producing Zinfandel and small lot wines. Founded in 1984.
news.summary: In Healdsburg, California, the Nalle Winery is marking its 40th anniversary this month. The winery, located in Sonoma County's Dry Creek Valley, has been producing estate old-vine Zinfandel and small lot wines for four decades. Founded by Doug Nalle in 1984, the winery has persevered through skepticism to become a staple in the region. The next generation of the Nalle family is now carrying on the winemaking tradition. Their historic property has been a labor of passion for the family for over a century.
